mapper.insert: insert into BUS_TRADETYPES (L_DATE, L_SERIAL_ID, C_TRADE_TYPE, L_PARENT_ID, L_FUND_ID, VC_TRADE_NO, VC_TRADE_NAME, C_TRADE_STATUS, VC_REMARKS, EN_TRADE_POWER, L_ROOT_ID, C_STOCKPOOL_TYPE, L_DIMLAYER_ID, D_UPDATETIME, ETL_TIME ) values (#{lDate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lSerialId,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{cTradeType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{lParentId,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lFundId,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{vcTradeNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcTradeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cTradeStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{vcRemarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enTradePower,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lRootId,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{cStockpoolType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{lDimlayerId,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{dUpdatetime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{etlTime,jdbcType=DATE} )
mapper.select: select L_DATE, L_SERIAL_ID, C_TRADE_TYPE, L_PARENT_ID, L_FUND_ID, VC_TRADE_NO, VC_TRADE_NAME, C_TRADE_STATUS, VC_REMARKS, EN_TRADE_POWER, L_ROOT_ID, C_STOCKPOOL_TYPE, L_DIMLAYER_ID, D_UPDATETIME, ETL_TIME from BUS_TRADETYPES

select
C_DIMENSION_CODE, VC_DIMENSION_NAME
from trade.TDIMENSIONCLASS
where VC_DIMENSION_NAME != '动态维度'

select
VC_TRADE_NO, VC_TRADE_NAME,C_TRADE_TYPE,L_SERIAL_ID POOL_ID
from TRADE.TTRADETYPES
and c_trade_type = #{c_trade_type}
